overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail at dusk. The character traverses a winding dirt path through hilly terrain with snow-capped mountains in the background and stone ruins along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail starting near stone structure

events.description: passing the stone wall and hanging cage, entering open mountain path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the mountain trail away from the stone structure, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: stone wall structure with wooden hanging cage attached
wooden cage suspended from metal frame
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks against teal sky
winding dirt path through mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins walking along a mountain trail near a stone wall with a hanging cage. The path opens toward distant snow-capped mountains as he moves forward through moderate vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail with stone ruins and sunset views

events.description: sky reveals pink and orange sunset clouds as the path curves right
ancient stone ruins appear on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt follows the curving trail to the right, passing ancient stone ruins on the left while heading toward open mountain views

entered.detail: ancient stone wall ruins alongside the path
colorful pink and orange sunset clouds in the teal sky
tall pine tree overlooking the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail curves right revealing a colorful sunset sky with pink clouds. Geralt passes stone ruins on the left as the mountain range shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with panoramic valley views

events.description: path opens to reveal expansive valley view with distant settlement below
trail curves left around the mountainside changing the viewing angle

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the ridge trail with panoramic views of the valley and distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: wide valley with scattered buildings and settlement visible below

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a panoramic valley view with a distant settlement below. Geralt continues along the winding ridge trail surrounded by mountain peaks.

events.description: trail becomes more enclosed by steep rocky hillside on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the narrowing trail hugging the rocky hillside with dense vegetation

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside rising immediately beside the path
thick vegetation and bushes lining the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows and becomes more enclosed as it hugs a rocky hillside. Dense vegetation lines the path while the open valley view disappears behind the terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a confined path near ruins into a wide, scenic vista under a sunset sky. It begins with Geralt walking beside a stone wall featuring a hanging cage, moving forward as the path opens toward distant snow-capped mountains. As the camera follows his progress through moderate vegetation, the trail curves to the right, gradually shifting the mountain range toward the left side of the frame. The scene then expands to reveal a colorful sunset sky filled with pink clouds while Geralt passes further stone ruins on his left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain ridge that shifts from a wide, panoramic vista to a narrow, enclosed trail. It begins as the path opens up to reveal a vast valley with a distant settlement nestled below, while the camera tracks Geralt moving amidst towering mountain peaks. As the character continues forward, the expansive view gradually disappears behind the rising terrain. The scene then shifts as the trail narrows and hugs a rocky hillside, with the open horizon being replaced by dense vegetation lining the path.
